name: divg
description: Digital Identity + Verification Graph — decentralised verification architecture for impact claims (SUI Move + Hedera HCS + Mesa ABM). MSc Thesis · Católica Lisbon · 2025/26.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:python
scripts.install:python: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/pip install --quiet numpy

author: Saba Azadegan
